message:
fix(test): serialize watchdog tests and decorrelate bloom FP rate probes

- resize_watchdog_integration: add GLOBAL_SNAPSHOT_LOCK mutex to serialize
  tests that read/write the process-global resize scheduler debug snapshot,
  preventing parallel test pollution of stalled transaction counts
- proptest_bloom_filter: use SplitMix64 key mixing for FP rate probe items
  instead of raw sequential i.to_le_bytes(), which creates pathological hash
  correlation with the FNV-1a + DJB2 double-hashing scheme at certain
  bit-array sizes (observed 28x expected FP rate for capacity=1629)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
